use_cases: Full-viewport hero section background with floating aurora-like orbs
Animated ambient background for landing pages and marketing sites
Immersive visual accent for SaaS and portfolio hero sections
Decorative animated canvas for immersive web experiences
Background component for creative agency or media websites
ai_summary: An animated aurora canvas component that renders floating, translucent orbs with vibrant gradient colors (teal, purple, blue, pink) across the full viewport. The orbs drift smoothly across the screen with subtle sine/cosine wave motion, creating a mesmerizing ambient effect ideal for hero sections or immersive backgrounds. Features responsive sizing with window resize handling.
